# DEPRECATED — DO NOT EDIT.
#
# This file is no longer used by any installer.
# - Dockerfile installs from requirements-heavy.txt + requirements-light.txt.
# - CI installs from requirements-heavy.txt + requirements-light.txt
#   (+ requirements-dev.txt for tests).
# - requirements-dev.txt now references heavy + light directly.
#
# Reason for retiring it: this file was a hand-maintained concat of
# heavy + light. It silently drifted (dependencies added to heavy/light
# were forgotten here), which broke CI when CI was reading this file as
# the source of truth.
#
# To add a Python dependency: edit requirements-heavy.txt (large /
# slow-to-install binaries) or requirements-light.txt (everything else).
#
# This file is kept (empty of deps) so existing local workflows that
# `pip install -r requirements.txt` get a clean no-op rather than an
# unexpected error. Will be deleted after a deprecation window.
